name: +1 Intimidating Dagger of Acid
description:
Dripping with acid, this weapon gives its bearer a bonus to intimidate their
foes.
dropLocation: Special event items, The Festival of Olladra Contest

name: +1 Starter Dagger
description: A short simple weapon with a pointed blade used for stabbing.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Heavy Mace
description:
A simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft. A religious
symbol appears to have been defaced on the head of the weapon.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Heavy Steel Shield
dropLocation: Enhancement bonus

name: +1 Starter Heavy Wooden Shield
dropLocation: Enhancement bonus

name: +1 Starter Kama
description:
A weapon with a straight inside edge attached perpendicularly to a thin wooden
haft and wielded with one hand. The wooden haft appears to have been sanded
down to remove a series of marks that would have made this item identifiable.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Longsword
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. This weapon is commonly
associated with knighthood and valor. The pommel appears to have had a symbol
that has been battered with a hammer.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Rapier
description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. Unlike other swords, this weapon lacks
an edged blade, and can only be used for thrusting attacks.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Scimitar
description:
A curved sword favored by the elves of Valenar. The unique shape gives this
weapon a keener edge. An enscription on the hilt reads 'To my dearest ...'.
The rest of the wording appears to have been melted off the hilt.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Starter Shortsword
description:
The smallest of the swords, light enough to be used as an offhand weapon but
too large to be considered a dagger. This appears to have an emblem that has
been sanded off the hilt.
dropLocation: The Voyage, End reward

name: +1 Vorpal Sickle of Haggling
description:
Useful for haggling, the Vorpal Sickle is a recognized tool used in trading
caravans from the Dhakaani clans of Darguun.
dropLocation:
Special event items, 
Emerald Claw Conspiracy, September 2008
Trade or no Trade, March 30, 2007 - April 8, 2007

name: +2 Intimidating Dagger of Paralyzing Acid
description:
Dripping with acid, this weapon gives its bearer a bonus to intimidate their
foes, additionally the acid from this weapon has a paralyzing effect on those
injured by its blade.
dropLocation: Special event items, The Festival of Olladra Contest

name: Acid Rune Arm
description: None
dropLocation: DDO Store, Not available anywhere else

name: Acidic Sphere
description: The elements beckon.
dropLocation: Black and Blue, end chest

name: Adherence
description: This shield was carried by the royal guard of Wroann.
dropLocation: Shield of Legend, Turn in completed Shield: Frame

name: Adoryn's Malice
description:
This light mace was named after one of the workers that worked in the foundry
of the Twilight Forge thousands of years ago. Adoryn was responsible for running
the forge that birthed the Warforged Titan . Upon realizing what he had helped
unleash on the world, he attempted to destroy it with this specially designed,
handcrafted light mace.
dropLocation: The Twilight Forge, End Chest

name: Aegis of Aosu'riel
description:
This Large Shield bears the visage of the Undying Court, and was raised against
you by the Archon Aosu'riel. Bear it with pride.
dropLocation: Seizing the Dawn, End chest

name: Aegis of Flame
description:
Clerics and Paladins often use their shields to bash their opponents, no doubt
why this one is ordained with several sharp metal spikes.
dropLocation: Silver Flame Nugget, End reward

name: Aegis of the First Watch
description: The inscription on the handle reads, "Vigilance, no matter what."
dropLocation: Violent Delights, End Chest

name: Agony, the Knife in the Dark
description: A blade such as this will always find a black heart to sheathe itself.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest
_file: Agony, the Knife in the Dark.item

name: Alchemical Bastard Sword
description:
Also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, and the largest of the single-handed
swords, this weapon requires special trainiing to use.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Battle Axe
description: A sturdy, broad-headed axe used as a weapon especially among dwarves.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Dagger
description: A short simple weapon with a pointed blade used for stabbing.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Dwarven Waraxe
description:
This axe is too large to be used in one hand without the special training that
all dwarven warriors receive.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Hand Axe
description: A smaller version of the Battleaxe, favored as an offhand weapon by dwarves.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End-chest

name: Alchemical Heavy Mace
description: A simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Heavy Pick
description:
A hammer with a sharp, pointed head designed to concentrate the force of its
blow on a small area. Similar to a miner's pick, but reinforced for battle.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Heavy Shield
description: This large metal shield is strapped to your forearm and gripped with your hand.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Kama
description:
A weapon with a straight inside edge attached perpendicularly to a thin wooden
haft and wielded with one hand.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Khopesh
description: An ancient sword with a heavy spine and a single blade.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Kukri
description: A heavy, curved knife with a sharp edge on the inside of the curve.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Light Hammer
description: A small sledge with a heavy blunt, square head.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Light Mace
description: A smaller simple weapon comprised of a solid blunt head attached to a haft.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Light Pick
description:
A smaller hammer with a sharp, pointed head designed to concentrate the force
of its blow on a small area. Similar to a miner's pick, but smaller and reinforced
for battle.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Light Shield
description: This light metal shield is strapped to your forearm and gripped with your hand.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Longsword
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. This weapon is commonly
associated with knighthood and valor.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Morningstar
description: A simple weapon comprised of a round, spiked head attached to a long haft.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Rapier
description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. Unlike other swords, this weapon lacks
an edged blade, and can only be used for thrusting attacks.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Sceptre
description: A simple weapon with a wide, round head and a narrow haft.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Scimitar
description:
A curved sword favored by the elves of Valenar. The unique shape gives this
weapon a keener edge.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Shortsword
description:
The smallest of the swords, light enough to be used as an offhand weapon, but
too large to be considered a dagger.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Sickle
description:
A simple weapon with a semicircular blade attached to a short handle. Typically
used by farmers for cutting grain.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Stone
description: Alchemical Mysteries swirl within.
dropLocation: Veteran Status II starter item

name: Alchemical Tower Shield
description:
This very large metal shield is strapped to your forearm and gripped with your
hand.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Alchemical Warhammer
description:
A large sledge with a heavy, square head. Popular among dwarves as an alternative
to the axe.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Either End chest

name: Allegiance (historic)
description:
A fine Khopesh enchanted to do battle against the rebellious elves in the last
days of the Lost Empire. Most likely, it was wielded by a loyal servant to
spill his own kin's blood.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, Black Dragon Chest

name: Alveo
description:
Cuts and scraps in this shield have a habit of catching an opponent's weapon
making it easier to hit your attackers.
dropLocation: The Bloody Crypt, End chest

name: Ancient Vulkoorim Dagger
description:
An ancient dagger forged in the days of the elven revolt against the giants.
This dagger has a small chance to kill any giant outright.
dropLocation: An Offering of Blood, any chest after 2nd Aspect

name: Animus
description:
A lemure's spirit is trapped within this rune arm. The loathing it has for you
is exceeded only by its hatred of your enemies.
dropLocation: Devil Assault (quest), End Chest

name: Arcane Contraption
description:
An abandoned sphere that seemed to have an intent and purpose once - Perhaps
in news hands, someone could unlock its hidden magic.
dropLocation: Special Delivery, end chest

name: Archaic Device
description:
Though you are not certain what this device was originally utilized for, it
seems to be able to absorb elemental energy and convert it into pure magical
force.
dropLocation: The Lost Thread, End chest ; Menace of the Underdark: The Darkening, Quest chain end reward

name: Arm of the Archons
description:
It appears an intrepid Artificer once modified this piece of Armor into a Rune
Arm; the ingenuity of House Cannith knows no bounds.
dropLocation: The Archons' Trial, End chest

name: Arrondi
description:
Meant to resemble a wyvern's folded wing, this shield was crafted to commemorate
a young adventurer's first real kill.
dropLocation: Shield of Legend, Turn in completed Shield: Frame

name: Audion, the Shattering Way
description: More than glass shatters from the sound of this hammer's strike.
dropLocation: Den of Vipers, end chest

name: Axe of Adaxus (Level 12)
description:
Legends speak of the first fire giant, Adaxus, whose fiendish alliances led
to the formation of the Sul'at League. Although the knowledge and wisdom of
these giants was lost in the cataclysm that destroyed Xen'drik, the once powerful
leader's axe apparently was not.
dropLocation: Madstone Crater, End chest (Heroic Normal)

description:
This weapon drives those it strikes mad with sensations of starvation, sapping
their strength while simultaneously reversing damage to its wielder's body
and mind.
dropLocation: Harbinger of Madness, End reward

name: Axe of the Unseen Blow
description:
Dwarven smiths crafted this hand axe to be an off-hand companion to a Dwarven
Waraxe. This hand axe is especially well balanced for off hand use reducing
the off hand penalty by 4 instead of the normal 2 for a light weapon.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Cholthulzz Chest, Mentau Chest, High Priest of Vol Chest, Cinnis Chest

by combining this shield with another Harbor shield that is in better shape.

by combining this shield with another Marketplace shield that is in better
shape.

recovered by an expedition into the Mournlands.

use.

This mace, named for the great light rising from Stormreach Harbor, longs for
its twin.

This mace, named for the great light rising from Stormreach Harbor, longs for

name: Bejeweled Letter Opener
description:
This small knife is bears several gems known to be easily enchanted with healing
properties. A low buzzing sound comes from the knife whenever it is drawn.
dropLocation: The Chamber of Raiyum, Treasure Room Chest

name: Belashyrra's Cleansed Scepter
description:
Though this is but a simple scepter, you feel as though you're holding an instrument
of great power and destruction in your hand as you grip its handle. You find
you cannot weave your spells quite as craftily, but they have become much more
explosive.
dropLocation: The Lord of Eyes, end chest

name: Bereavement
description:
A battle axe created in the Twilight Forge itself. This weapon was forged using
some of the same processes as creating Warforged.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded chest

description: A brightly colored jewel is set in the center of this drow ceremonial shield.

description: This blade was forged by the Silver Flame to purge undead from the living world.
dropLocation: The Friar's Niece, End chest

well in your travels.
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, end chest

description: This blade has been used as an implement in the working of countless dark rituals.
dropLocation: The Portal Opens, End chest ; Menace of the Underdark: City of Portals, Quest chain end reward

name: Braisingstar
description:
The hill giant shaman Brawnpits, renowned throughout Gianthold for his haute
cuisine, has been wielding this morningstar to perfect his art. Not only is
it excellent at the task of tenderizing meat, but the heat it gives off can
also cook a carcass to perfection. From the distinctive smell, you suspect
Brawnpits may also have been using it to stir a pot of his trademark stew.
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, Raid Warded chest (Epic Normal)

name: Celestia, Brightest Star of Day
description:
This magnificent bastard sword appears to somehow have been made from a ray
of solidified light. It is nearly weightless, and despite its size, is able
to be wielded effectively by anyone who is proficient in the use of short swords.
Rumor and hushed whispers tell of three sunblades among the Stars of Day that
stand out from their brethren, feared by all that hide in shadow and darkness.
This blade is Celestia, the Brightest Star of Day.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Celestial Beacon
description:
This sceptre radiates brilliant light. It's painful to look at, but at least
you'll have trouble losing it.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, Burket and Snarla's chest

name: Celestial Oak
description: This wooden shield is carved from strange wood of unknown origins.
dropLocation: Legendary Hound of Xoriat, End chest and Legendary Tempest's Spine End chest

name: Champion of the Twins
description:

tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach. This shield is a
fusion of their will and devotion.

name: Corruption of Nature (Level 15)
description:
This magical device, found in Eveningstar's hospital, seems to somehow have
been altered by the magical plague afflicting the villagers. When worn by an
Artificer capable of channeling energy through it, it infects them with a benign
version of the disease, temporarily toughening their skin for as long as the
rune arm is worn.
dropLocation: Outbreak, End chest

description:
This shining, divine blade is of legendary repute, and is said to have been
used by a paladin who ventured into the Subterrane to battle its denizens.
It becomes more powerful when used by those who are devoted to Law, and its
power increases even further when a paladin wields it.
dropLocation: A Vision of Destruction, End chest

wood.

the Underdark.

description:

Nevertheless, it's extremely effective against purple worms and the digestive
slimes that inhabit their stomachs.
dropLocation: In the Belly of the Beast, Special quest only temporary weapon

with adamantine-reinforced blows.
dropLocation: The Lord of Stone, End chest

name: Echo of the Artblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Artblade. This echo broke off of the
Artblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's draconian tendencies, and is
open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest (rare)

name: Echo of the Crownblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Ruler's Blade, also known as the Crownblade.
This echo broke off of the Crownblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's
draconian tendencies, and is open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: The Zulkir's Plan, end chest (rare)

name: Echo of the Sunsword
description:
This blade, like the one that ended Strahd, shines with a brilliant glow. It's
not the same, but it's close.

name: Echo of The Tome of Strahd
description:
The book, written by Strahd himself, is bound in a thick leather cover with

of its owner.

a thin and sharp enough weapon to bypass the defenses of many targets and deliver
critical blows.
dropLocation: The Lords of Dust, End chest

This dagger has a small chance to kill any giant outright.

lawful opponents.

A curved sword with an elegant hilt, popular amongst pirates for its intimidating
and yet sophisticated appearance. This particular blade is infused with the
rowdiness and anarchy of a high-seas brigand, and is impeccably useful against
lawful opponents.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1200 Copper Doubloon 600 Silver Doubloon 35 Stolen Emerald at Dusty Old Treasure of Crystal Cove

will slow their actions, and if you are falling and in danger it will slow
your descent so that you land safely.

is used to clear thick brush or undergrowth when travelling in a dense forest.
It is similar enough to a kama to be wielded expertly by someone who is proficient
with one. This blade seems to have been enchanted to adapt to whatever material
you are trying to cut with it, bypassing most forms of damage reduction.

name: Green Steel Shortsword
description:
The smallest of the swords, light enough to be used as an offhand weapon, but
too large to be considered a dagger.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Green Steel Sickle
description:
A simple weapon with a semicircular blade attached to a short handle. Typically
used by farmers for cutting grain.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Green Steel Warhammer
description:
A large sledge with a heavy, square head. Popular among dwarves as an alternative
to the axe.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Greenstone Dagger
description: This green stone has crystallized into something deadly.
dropLocation: One Dame Thing After Another, end chest

name: Grievous Blade
description:
This dagger is a cruel looking instrument. The notched blade is designed to
leave a ragged, ill-healing wound. A well placed strike will cause much blood
loss.
dropLocation: The Tear of Dhakaan, Champion Tarkar 's chest

name: Grix's Gouger
description: It's best not to think about the violence that this crystalline Pick has enabled.
dropLocation: Hunt or Be Hunted, end chest

name: Guardian Mantle
description:
Specially designed grooves cover the surface of this shield, making it very
effective against spears and arrows.
dropLocation: The Tear of Dhakaan, Champion Krazna 's Chest

name: Guardian of Stormreach Shield (angular)
description:
The Harbor is the lifeline of the city of Stormreach, and the guardians of Stormreach
use this sun and water motif shield to remind the foes of the city that the
harbor will always remain open.
dropLocation: DDO Store

name: Guardian of Stormreach Shield (round)
description:

name: Gwylan's Blade

name: Hallowsphere
description:

lord's throwing-hammer. When swung, it rumbles like distant thunder.

more.

buffs.type: Rune Arm Imbue - Knife Shot VI

name: Kobold Admiral's Tiller
description:
Finding himself surrounded at the helm by a fierce pack of stowaway wererats,
kobold 'Admiral' Ancker tore the ship's wheel off and, using it to fend them
off, defeated the mangy lot of them. In honor of the day, he had the wheel
fashioned into a 'proper' buckler shield.
dropLocation: Ghost of a Chance (epic), Puzzle chest; Three-Barrel Cove (epic), All Rare Encounters

name: Legendary Destructive Hooked Blade
description:
This vicious, curved sword, capable of slicing straight through enemy limbs,
can now weaken the defenses of the wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Hooked Blade

name: Legendary Drowhunter
description:
This impressive war axe was forged to target the Drow, striking down all who
did not flee from its fearsome wielder.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, End Chest

name: Legendary Drysvayla's Razor
description:
A fragment of the great Green Dragon's power made manifest, a sad reminder of
a day where reason failed.
dropLocation: Going Rogue, end chest

name: Legendary Duelist's Epee
description: This Rapier is ideal for any who fancy themselves a duelist.
dropLocation: The Haunting of Saltmarsh, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Duelist's Epee

name: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest
_file: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Fallen Age.item

name: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest
_file: Legendary Dwarven Waraxe of the Golden Age.item

name: Legendary Dynastic Falcata
description:
A fine falcata forged for the sons of kings. It is said that it takes more than
strength to lead a kingdom.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Dynastic Falcata

name: Legendary Echo of the Artblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Artblade. This echo broke off of the
Artblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's draconian tendencies, and is
open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of the Crownblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Ruler's Blade, also known as the Crownblade.
This echo broke off of the Crownblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's
draconian tendencies, and is open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: The Zulkir's Plan, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of the Warblade
description:
An echo of the legendary elven longsword Warblade. This echo broke off of the
Warblade's mind in defiance of the Blade-rite's draconian tendencies, and is
open to being wielded by anyone.
dropLocation: The Key to the Mythal, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary Echo of Whelm
description:
Steely strikes and brewing storms

There is something missing from this legendary weapon... something that makes
it feel... incomplete.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, End chest

name: Legendary Echoes of Night
description:
Prototype Notes I: This form of Rune Arm has not been attempted previously.
If successful, it could be the model for some future development.
dropLocation: The Knife's Edge, end chest

name: Legendary Elyd Edge
description:
Elven script on this fine silver blade reads 'Anthem of the heart; Anthem of
the mind'.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Elyd Edge

name: Legendary Envenomed Blade
description:
A small blade wielded by the drow assassins of Faerun's Underdark, steeped in
a powerful poison that causes persistent damage to its targets. It is also
a thin and sharp enough weapon to bypass the defenses of many targets and deliver
critical blows.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Envenomed Blade

name: Legendary Fangs of the Wild Hunt
description:
Guard dogs have been used throughout Barovia over the years, grim reminders
that none are welcome. Bug: Likely to be changed in the future, because it
is a raw copy-n-paste from Hound of the Night by the devs.
dropLocation: The Feywild, rare encounters
_file: Legendary Fangs of the Wild Hunt.item

name: Legendary Feast of the Four Fighters Commemorative Cookbook
description:
A collection of fine recipes from years past. The ones the victors were willing
to divulge, anyway.
dropLocation: Too Many Cooks, end chest
_file: Legendary Feast of the Four Fighters Commemorative Cookbook.item

name: Legendary Ferrocrystal Bastard Sword
description:
This Crystalline weapon seems to hum with strong Magnetic energies. It is able
to break the Cold Iron damage reduction of enemies such as Fey.
dropLocation: Fables of the Feywild, any chest, or turn in 20 Legendary Chunks of Ferrocrystal at the Cauldron of Cadence

description:
This sword's name is spelled in Dwarvish Runes carefully etched into its silver
blade.
dropLocation: Bullywugs and Booby Traps, end chest

name: Legendary Firesplitter
description: Originally meant to cut firewood, this axe now burns with its own inner heat.
dropLocation: The Trouble with Tar Pits, end chest

name: Legendary Fish Stick
dropLocation: Sleeping with the Fishes, end chest

name: Legendary Flame Sphere
description: The elements beckon.
dropLocation: The Newcomers, end chest

name: Legendary Flamesalt Bastard Sword
description:
This weapon's steel has partially corroded due to the salt in the air, which
interfered with the forging process. It seems to have enhanced the weapon's
with a subtle magic, making it equivalent to Flametouched Iron, at the cost
of some of the steel's natural durability.
dropLocation: Captain Xendros, Turn in 5 Legendary Quartermaster's Chits

name: Legendary Flameward
description:
A small implement that has been imbued with magic to shield the wielder from
extreme heat. Apparently that protection was not quite enough to preserve its
previous owner, but at least it also makes the wielder glowingly confident.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Flameward

name: Legendary Flicker of the Crescent Moon
description: The Shining Crescent will reflect all else.
dropLocation: Blown Deadline, End chest
_file: Legendary Flicker of the Crescent Moon.item

name: Legendary Flickering Divinity
description:
Light sputters softly somewhere within this orb, a lingering link to some far-off
divinity.
dropLocation: Cold Snap, Althea chest

name: Legendary Flint
description: A stone dagger crackling with magical energies.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Flint

name: Legendary Flotsam (level 32)
description:
This driftwood shard has saved a few lives by being hard to detect as a weapon.
It seems to be effective against the undead.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1500 Silver Doubloon 700 Golden Doubloon 45 Stolen Jasper 1000 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Legendary Forge
description:
In years long passed, Dwarf blacksmiths used hammers such as this to forge the
very blades that are still wielded against the Drow.
dropLocation: Strike Back, End chest

name: Legendary Forgotten Axe
description:
This small stone axe looks like it was forgotten for a long time. If you had
to estimate, eleven years or so. That's a long time to forget about a Hand
Axe.
dropLocation: Black and Blue, end chest

name: Legendary Forgotten Tome
description:
It's unknown whether or not anyone has read, or even can read, this weighty
volume.
dropLocation: Turn the Page (quest), End chest

name: Legendary Freezing Longsword of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

its full potential.

The whirring mechanisms at play here freeze up often - Nothing that some swift
percussive maintenance can't fix, however.
dropLocation: Cold Snap, end chest (rare)

swords, this weapon requires special trainiing to use.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

description: A sturdy, broad-headed axe used as a weapon especially among dwarves.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

description:

associated with knighthood and valor.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

description: A simple weapon comprised of a round, spiked head and a long haft.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

description:
A long, thin sword with a fine point. Unlike other swords, this weapon lacks
an edged blade, and can only be used for thrusting attacks.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

notice. Thankfully, these accursed books are used for little else other than
blunt force trauma.

dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

description:
A dagger set with precious gems, each of which are enchanted with spell-enhancing
magic. Most likely it was seized from nobles by a band of pirates as part of
their pillaging.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in 1500 Silver Doubloon 700 Golden Doubloon 45 Stolen Jasper 1000 Green Dragonshard at Euphonia's Barter Box

name: Legendary Petrifying Hooked Blade
description:
This vicious, curved sword, capable of slicing straight through enemy limbs,
can now cause its wielder's foes to turn solidly to stone.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Hooked Blade

name: Legendary Phiarlan Spy Dagger
description:
House Phiarlan assassins and spies carry daggers like this when they need to
carry out a mission efficiently and from the shadows. This particular blade
drips acid when drawn and can lure foes into letting down their guard.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Phiarlan Spy Dagger

name: Legendary Planar Spike
description: Something very wrong lies somewhere deep within.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Legendary Poniard of Pain

dropLocation: The Knife's Edge, end chest (rare)

dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), Rare Chests, and All Hail the King end chest

name: Legendary Prototype I: Siren Test
description:
Prototype Notes I: This form of Rune Arm has not been attempted previously.
If successful, it could be the model for some future development.
dropLocation: Vecna Denied, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype II: Cooling Mechanism
description:
Prototype Notes II: This was fashioned from a ruined cooling system. The cooling
magics seem stable, but it could use tuning for optimal output.
dropLocation: What Dreams May Come, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype III: Propulsion Module
description:
Prototype Notes III: This was supposed to allow for a controlled burn, not a
raging inferno! Tune down.
dropLocation: Taken in Hand, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype IV: Discharge System
description:
Prototype Notes IV: Well, at least we managed to output the excess lightning
SOMEWHERE. I'm not sure this solution is optimal, however. Back to the drawing
board.
dropLocation: Vecna Denied, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype V: Byproduct Disposal
description:
Prototype Notes V: I know these machines need to occasionally expel waste, butâ€¦
this is disgusting. The resulting liquid is chewing through everything. Better
fired at foes than onto me, I suppose.
dropLocation: Enemy of My Enemy, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype VI: Impact Redistributor
description:
Prototype Notes VI: This Rune Arm knocked this researcher over the minute it
was used. Recommended only for those stronger than I.
dropLocation: Party 101, End chest

name: Legendary Prototype VII: Flash Transferal
description:
Prototype Notes VII: Particularly stable? Working with light seems to be relatively
benign. Well, for me, not for the Rune Arm's target.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Legendary Quarantine
description: It's hard to spread plague when you're frozen solid.
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Legendary Templar's Bulwark
description:
Templars of the Silver Flame wield these massive tower shields, said to blessed
by Tira Miron, to guard against weapon blows and elemental spells alike.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Templar's Bulwark

name: Legendary Templar's Justice
description:
A sanctified axe that shines brightly with the power of the Silver Flame. It
is said to deliver the wrath of Tira Miron again and again upon those that
it strikes.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Templar's Justice

name: Legendary Templar's Retribution
description:

It is said to deliver the wrath of Tira Miron again and again upon those that
it strikes.

and speculates about the true nature of the Mark of Death.

A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies

dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Timeblade

A strong enough electric shock can end life. Another strong one can begin it

from its wielder's foes.

malevolent influence has transformed its once-mundane blade into one resembling
his own.
dropLocation: Desire in the Dark, End chest

description:
This ancient, worn shield is crafted from densewood. Despite its age and exposure
to the elements, it still provides excellent protection.

description:
The St. Marie was the flagship galleon in its fleet, but met its untimely end

a particularly unique souvenir.
dropLocation: The Stone Crypt Chronicle, end chest

name: Legendary Wreckage of the Beachcomber
description:
The Beachcomber was a ship so fast - legends say the crew manned it didn't carry
cannons for fear of weighing it down.
dropLocation: Wild Thing, end chest

name: Legendary Wreckage of the Drowned Rat
description:
The Drowned Rat was a fiesty galleon, an expert at plundering and daring escapes.
Alas, it met its end against the volcanic rocks under the terrible weight of
a fearsome storm.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest
_file: Legendary Wreckage of the Drowned Rat.item

description:
This piece of wreckage longs to return to whence it cames - the whelming waves

dropLocation: Bullywugs and Booby Traps, end chest

This relic of the Silver Flame was supposedly once worn by the powerful paladin

tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach.
dropLocation: Hound of Xoriat, Warded Chest

description:
Long ago a champion of light and a champion of darkness faced off against one
another in perfect balance. Neither could defeat the other until the champion
of light sacrificed herself to mortally wound her foe. In the days that followed,
this item was forged from the shattered remains of their shields.
dropLocation:
The Mindsunder, Disc locked optional end chest ; 
 Chance on every 3rd completion of The Mindsunder

down to remove a series of marks that would have made this item identifiable.

magic, Nightmare will serve anyone strong enough to claim it... for a time.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Prototype I: Siren Test
description:
Prototype Notes I: This form of Rune Arm has not been attempted previously.
If successful, it could be the model for some future development.
dropLocation: Vecna Denied, End chest

name: Prototype II: Cooling Mechanism
description:
Prototype Notes II: This was fashioned from a ruined cooling system. The cooling
magics seem stable, but it could use tuning for optimal output.
dropLocation: What Dreams May Come, End chest

name: Prototype III: Propulsion Module
description:
Prototype Notes III: This was supposed to allow for a controlled burn, not a
raging inferno! Tune down.
dropLocation: Taken in Hand, End chest

name: Prototype IV: Discharge System
description:
Prototype Notes IV: Well, at least we managed to output the excess lightning
SOMEWHERE. I'm not sure this solution is optimal, however. Back to the drawing
board.
dropLocation: Vecna Denied, End chest

name: Prototype V: Byproduct Disposal
description:
Prototype Notes V: I know these machines need to occasionally expel waste, butâ€¦
this is disgusting. The resulting liquid is chewing through everything. Better
fired at foes than onto me, I suppose.
dropLocation: Enemy of My Enemy, End chest

name: Prototype VI: Impact Redistributor
description:
Prototype Notes VI: This Rune Arm knocked this researcher over the minute it
was used. Recommended only for those stronger than I.
dropLocation: Party 101, End chest

name: Prototype VII: Flash Transferal
description:
Prototype Notes VII: Particularly stable? Working with light seems to be relatively
benign. Well, for me, not for the Rune Arm's target.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Prysuul's Bane
description:
A bastard sword infused with Prysuul's essence and blessed by the Sovereign
Host, this sword will prove to be a powerful weapon against the demons.
dropLocation: Invaders!, End chest (Only if Prysuul is the end boss)

name: Purple Dragon Shield
description:
With his group of eleven other Purple Dragon knights, the former owner of this
shield raided the Haunted Halls and was never seen again. Hopefully the same
fate shall not befall you.
dropLocation: The Haunted Halls of Eveningstar, Skeleton or Dragon chest

name: Quarantine
description: It's hard to spread plague when you're frozen solid.

function when beyond the influence of a magically bound receptor pedestal.

name: Radiant Rune Arm
description: None

name: Raellia, the Frostblade
description:
A razor-sharp column of stinging ice that sprang forth from your hands... Although
it's not quite clear what has conjured it. The ice responds to the willpower
and intuition of the wielder. As the Frost Blade is not physical, monks may
use it without becoming uncentered.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Rahl's Wrath
description: This kama was once owned by a dedicated monk name Rahl.

on this weapon to equip it.

name: St. Mu'Ray's Fire
description:

dropLocation: Precious Cargo, End chest, Chance to be in Chain reward list (Cydonie)

name: Star of Day
description:
Though seemingly made of pure gold, the blade of this bastard sword is as hard
as steel. It is also surprisingly light, able to be wielded effectively by
anyone who is proficient in the use of short swords. The clergy of the sun
god, Amaunator, have brought a number of these powerful relics to Eveningstar
in order to help combat the Darkening. Rumor and hushed whispers tell of three
blades among the Stars of Day that stand out from their bretheren, feared by
all that hide in shadow and darkness. This blade is not one of them.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 15 Commendations: Clerics of the Amaunator Commendation: Clerics of Amaunator : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Clerics of Amaunator. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: The Arc Welder (close range)
description:
SAFETY INSTRUCTIONS:
Use the short-range welding prototype to join metals with a surge of electricity.
Power supplies are accepted via rear-oriented connection. Do not look directly
into the aperture. Do not point the aperture at any nonmetal apparatus while
connected to a power supply. Do not submerge this welding prototype in water.
Do not attempt to disassemble the prototype or any accompanying power supply
materials.

WARNING: Operating this prototype without safety equipment, including
but not limited to appropriately fitting and approved safety goggles, may cause
serious damage to yourself and others. User caution is advised.
dropLocation: Third Time's a Charm, End chest

description:
This rapier adeptly subverts enemy defenses using the jolts of electricity infused
within its slender blade.
dropLocation: Third Time's a Charm, End Chest

name: Tiefling Assassin's Blade
description:
This shortsword is viciously serrated, increasing the likelyhood of dealing
critical damage to an enemy. The blade is coated with a potent toxin, inflaming
any wounds inflicted by this weapon.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), Ithun Orenah 's chest (Rare Encounter)

name: Timeblade
description:
A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies
will slow their actions, and if you are falling and in danger it will slow
your descent so that you land safely.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, End reward

name: Timeshard
description:
A sword gifted with the power to bend time. Powerful blows against your enemies
will slow their actions.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

name: Tinah, Sword of the Sea
description:
Once wielded by the Legendary sailor, Paeyn the Bold, this blade was the scourge
of dragons for miles around the Sea of Fallen Stars. How it came to be here
is a mystery.
dropLocation: Caught in the Web, End Chest

name: Tira's Splendor (Craftable)
description:
Tira Miron gave her life to defeat a powerful demon lord long ago, joining her
soul with the Silver Flame to become its voice. This rune arm was created as
a tribute to her sacrifice.
dropLocation: The Subterrane - Central, Garamol chest

name: Tira's Splendor
description:
Tira Miron gave her life to defeat a powerful demon lord long ago, joining her
soul with the Silver Flame to become its voice. This rune arm was created as
a tribute to her sacrifice.
dropLocation: The Subterrane - Central, Garamol chest

name: Titan's Fist (Craftable)
description: Elements of the Warforged Titan's cannon make up this scavenged rune arm.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded chest

name: Titan's Fist
description: Elements of the Warforged Titan's cannon make up this scavenged rune arm.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded chest

name: Toothpick
description:
A long, thin, slightly rusted sword with a fine point. It appears to be encrusted
with small chunks of an unknown material.
dropLocation: Prey on the Hunter, End chest

name: Tornado
description:
This simple handaxe is surprising sturdy and extremely light. Those that seek
to master it should flow with the wind rather than fight against it.
dropLocation: Killing Time, end chest

name: Toven's Hammer (Craftable)
description: When all you have is a hammer, everything looks like a nail.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Rightside End Chest

name: Toven's Hammer
description: When all you have is a hammer, everything looks like a nail.
dropLocation: The Master Artificer, Rightside End Chest

name: Toven's Prototype
description: This arcane device clicks and whirs and hums with invention
dropLocation: Legendary Master Artificer, End and Optional Chest

name: Tower Shield of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this shield over the years.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest
_file: Tower Shield of the Fallen Age.item

name: Tower Shield of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the Glory of Cormanthor, this shield is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest (rare)
_file: Tower Shield of the Golden Age.item

name: Treason
description:
This weapon was a trophy of the giants' last victory, taken from the fallen
captain of the rebel elves. When the dragons intervened and obliterated the
Lost Empire, Treason was lost in the ashes.
dropLocation: The Reaver's Fate, Raid Warded chest

name: Trial by Fire (Craftable)
description:
Droaam is sometimes a cruel and brutal place. Artificers that hail from there
often enchant their armaments to help them survive the inevitable power struggles.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Trial by Fire
description:
Droaam is sometimes a cruel and brutal place. Artificers that hail from there
often enchant their armaments to help them survive the inevitable power struggles.
dropLocation: Attack on Stormreach, End reward

name: Turbine Shield
description: A large metal shield is strapped to your forearm and gripped with your hand.
dropLocation: N/A

name: Turbulent Epee
description:
A rapier, once well-kept by its original Elven owner, which has become twisted
and warped by the plane of Madness. Xoriat has granted this sword the ability
to unleash the elements upon its foes, but it never seems to settle on one
type...
dropLocation: Missing, Swiftfoot HQ chest

name: Twinblade
description:
After a vicious battle in the Torlaac Moor, a swordsmith collected the blades
of the two fallen leaders and joined them together in this weapon.
dropLocation: Tome of Untold Legends, Turn in completed Tome: Binding

name: Twisted Metal
description: This broken and bent shield should pack quite the punch.
dropLocation: The Borderlands, chest (Rare Encounters)

name: Tyrzza's Bane
description:
A rapier infused with Tyrzza's essence and blessed by the Sovereign Host, this
sword will prove to be a powerful weapon against the demons.
dropLocation: Invaders!, End chest (only if Tyrzza is the end boss)

name: Ultimatum
description: There is no question anymore; evil hands will never prevail.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, Warded chest

name: Unbridled Power
description:
A strong enough electric shock can end life. Another strong one can begin it
again.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part Two), end chest

name: Unkor's Cleaver
description: The blade on this enormous meat cleaver is pitted and scarred by use.
dropLocation: Chains of Flame, Treasury chest

name: Untold, Crack in the Sky
description: The white feather drifts to the quiet sea below.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, End chest

name: Valen's Mace
description:
This mace once belonged to Valen, a cleric of the Silver Flame. It is said to
be quite potent against the Sahuagin.
dropLocation: The Collaborator, End reward

name: Valorius, the Flameblade
description:
A blazing beam of red hot fire that sprang forth from your hands... Although
it's not quite clear what has conjured it. The flames respond to the willpower
and intuition of the wielder. As the Flame Blade is not physical, monks may
use it without becoming uncentered.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Vampiric Fury Shortsword
description:
This small sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now draw life
from its wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Upgraded version of Blade of Fury and Staff of the Shadow

name: Vampiric Rocksplitter
description:
This pick, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can now draw life
from its wielder's foes.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Rocksplitter + Staff of the Shadow + Mark of Rhesh Turakbar

name: Van Richten's Cane
description:
The legendary vampire hunter Rudolph van Richten was prepared for every eventuality.
With this swordcane, you will be too.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, End chest

name: Van Richten's Legendary Cane
description:
The legendary vampire hunter Rudolph van Richten was prepared for every eventuality.
With this swordcane, you will be too.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, End chest

name: Vengeful Calamity
description:
A divine shield said to have been used by a paladin who ventured into the Subterrane
to battle its denizens. It lashes out against those who attack you, almost
with a mind of its own, and magnifies the power of positive energy directed
at you.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Vengeful Fury Shortsword
description:
This small sword, capable of conferring a disease to enemies, can now stir its
wielder's emotions, driving him or her into a rage.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Upgraded version of Blade of Fury and Ogrish War Axe

name: Vengeful Protector
description:
A divine shield said to have been used by a paladin who ventured into the Subterrane
to battle its denizens. It lashes out against those who attack you, almost
with a mind of its own, and magnifies the power of positive energy directed
at you.
dropLocation: A Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Vengeful Rocksplitter
description:
This pick, said to be infused with the Shadow's arcane power, can now stir its
wielder's emotions, driving him or her into a rage.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgrade of Rocksplitter + Ogrish War Axe + Mark of Rhesh Turakbar

name: Vivace, the Dreamcarver
description:
Forged of crystalline Dreamstone, this rapier resonates within your hands. Its
twisting colors seem to draw you in with every passing second.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, Greater feytwisted chest

name: Vulkoor's Edge
description: The Drow have sharpened this blade to an incredibly fine edge.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Wall of Wood (level 15)
description:
This splendid heavy shield is made out of rare densewood, harvested from the
King's Forest. Obviously reinforced with magical enchantments, it provides
much greater protection than a normal shield of its size.
dropLocation:
Overgrowth, Wood Woads chest (Heroic Normal) ; 
 The Druid's Deep, Quest chain end reward

name: Wall of Wood (level 16)
description:
This splendid heavy shield is made out of rare densewood, harvested from the
King's Forest. Obviously reinforced with magical enchantments, it provides

dropLocation: Overgrowth, Wood Woad's chest (Heroic Hard)

dropLocation: Overgrowth, Wood Woads chest (Epic Elite)

name: Ward of Undeath
description:
A large shield made from flame-touched iron. This shield is particularly effective
when bashing the Undead.
dropLocation: An Offering of Blood, chest in any of the three rooms after the 2nd Aspect.

name: Warhammer of the Fallen Age
description: Wild magic has imbued entropy into this weapon over the years.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, any end chest

name: Warhammer of the Golden Age
description: Forged in the glory of Cormanthor, this weapon is remarkably well-preserved.
dropLocation: Magic of Myth Drannor, rare drop in any end chest

name: Warhammer of the Undying Age
description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.
dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Warhammer of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

name: Warsword Shield
description: Defend yourself against the unknown.
dropLocation: Into the Mists, End chest

name: Waste, the Weak's End
description: The chains of death are falling away, but the heart still bleeds.
dropLocation: Den of Vipers, end chest

name: Watcher's Blade
description:
An elegant but unsettling sword infused with the power of Belashyrra, the daelkyr
Lord of Eyes. You feel as though someone is watching you as long as you're
holding it. Nevertheless, it shares its awareness with you and is thus a good
ward against danger.
dropLocation: Acute Delirium, End chest

name: Wave of Despair
description:
The edges of this bastard sword glow with a sinister purple light. Graz'zt's
malevolent influence has transformed its once-mundane blade into one resembling
his own.
dropLocation: Desire in the Dark, End chest

name: Wayfinder's Scepter
description:
This scepter is a trophy of renown in the halls of Wayfinder Foundation. Those
who have received this exclusive reward
dropLocation: Special event items, Item Finding Reward

name: Weathered Targe
description:
This ancient, worn shield is crafted from densewood. Despite its age and exposure
to the elements, it still provides excellent protection.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Undead Area: Whirling Ozann 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Wharfrat's Plank
description:
A clever sailor in need of a shield made this item. Somewhere there is a sunken
ship with a hole cut out of the starboard side.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Wheel of the St. Marie
description:
The St. Marie was the flagship galleon in its fleet, but met its untimely end
when it was boarded and raided by bloodthirsty pirates. This must have been
a particularly unique souvenir.
dropLocation: The Stone Crypt Chronicle, End chest

name: Whirling Words
description:
This Rune Arm belonged to a very literate wizard in a tower. All of his read
tomes are fed into this machine, and the supply seems endless.
dropLocation: Tower of Frost, End chest

name: Whisperdoom's Fang
description: The fang of Whisperdoom, great spider of Splinterskull, drips with toxic venom.
dropLocation: Assault on Splinterskull, End reward

name: Widowblight
description:
Kar'Thul ogres forged this wicked blade using a process which involved tempering
it in the blood and venom of magically bred spiders.This particular one seems
unfinished, which suggests it may have been a prototype. Nonetheless, this
weapon is very deadly
dropLocation: The Spawn of Whisperdoom, Turn in Splinterskull Historical Documents to the Ungurz Lieutenant for a small chance to get it

name: Wild Blade
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Wild Flame
description: The rage of wildfire, harnessed.
dropLocation: The Madness of Crowds, End chest

name: Wild Frost
description: The sting of winter, harnessed.
dropLocation: The Madness of Crowds, End chest

name: Wind-Swept Buckler
description: The colors on this buckler have faded with time and tide.
dropLocation: Back to Basics, end chest

name: Wing of Tailara
description: A frozen blade, hidden away from the one who made it.
dropLocation: The Final Draw, end chest

name: Wither, the Venomous Voice
description: Lost in the mists, this Sickle once more seeks to poison the hearts of its foes.
dropLocation: Den of Vipers, end chest

name: Wizard's Ward (Level 16)
description:
This incomparable crystal orb is imbued with a myriad of enchantments to help
a wielder better focus and direct arcane energies.
dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Wizard's Ward (Level 17)
description:
This incomparable crystal orb is imbued with a myriad of enchantments to help
a wielder better focus and direct arcane energies.
dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Heroic Hard)

description:
This incomparable crystal orb is imbued with a myriad of enchantments to help
a wielder better focus and direct arcane energies.
dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Heroic Elite)

description:

a wielder better focus and direct arcane energies.
dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Epic Normal), Netherese Legacy chain end reward

description:

dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Epic Hard)

description:

dropLocation: Detour, Song 's chest (Epic Elite)

name: Wrath of Siberys
description:
The once gaudy-finish of this shield is worn away by time and use, revealing
a bright and shining surface underneath.
dropLocation: Thrall of the Necromancer, End chest

name: Wreckage of the Beachcomber
description:
The Beachcomber was a ship so fast - legends say the crew that manned it didn't
carry cannons for fear of weighing it down.
dropLocation: Wild Thing, end chest

name: Wreckage of the Drowned Rat
description:
The Drowned Rat was a fiesty galleon, an expert at plundering and daring escapes.
Alas, it met its end against the volcanic rocks under the terrible weight of
a fearsome storm.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest

name: Wreckage of the Tabernack
description:
This piece of wreckage longs to return to whence it cames - the whelming waves
just off the coast of the Isle of Dread.
dropLocation: Bullywugs and Booby Traps, End chest

name: Xoriat Forged Blade
description:
A classic straight-bladed sword usable in one hand. This weapon is commonly
associated with knighthood and valor.
dropLocation: Caverns of Korromar, Serruul 's chest

name: Zephyr
description: A fine steel shortsword containing a bound air elemental.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Yurrugh the Swift 's chest (Rare Encounter); 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens
